title: LinkedIn Profile Analyzer
description: Upload your LinkedIn PDF export to get an AI-powered analysis with scores and improvement suggestions for each section.
analyzingWait: This usually takes 15-45 seconds. Please wait.
analysisFailedDefault: An error occurred during analysis. Please try again.

history.title: Analysis History
history.noHistory: No analysis history yet. Upload a LinkedIn PDF to get started.

import.title: Import from LinkedIn
import.subtitle: Import your career data from a LinkedIn data export ZIP file
import.existingDataWarning: You already have data in your profile ({{jobs}} jobs, {{education}} education entries, {{skills}} skills). You can choose to merge new data or replace existing data during import.

step1.title: Download Your Data
step1.description: The ZIP file is not generated instantly. LinkedIn needs time to prepare your data archive. You will receive an email when it's ready to download.
step1.instruction1: Go to LinkedIn Settings > Data Privacy > Download your data
step1.instruction2: Select the data categories you want (Profile, Positions, Education, Skills, Languages)
step1.instruction3: Click "Request archive" and wait for the email from LinkedIn
step1.instruction4: Once you receive the email, download the ZIP file
step1.instruction5: Come back here and upload the ZIP file in the next step
step1.note: Note: LinkedIn may take a few minutes to several hours to prepare your data. You will receive an email at your LinkedIn address when the download is ready.

step2.title: Upload ZIP File
step2.dropzone: Drag and drop your LinkedIn ZIP file here, or click to browse

step3.title: Review & Import
step3.mergeDesc: Add new items, keep your existing data
step3.overwriteDesc: Replace all existing data with imported data
step3.mergeInfo: New items will be added. Your existing data will be kept intact.
step3.overwriteWarning: This will delete your existing profile data!
step3.overwriteWarningDetailed: WARNING: This will DELETE all your existing profile data ({{jobs}} jobs, {{education}} education entries, {{skills}} skills) and replace them with the imported data. This action cannot be undone.
step3.overwriteConfirm: I understand my existing data will be permanently replaced
